nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_enable
nml_option.description: If true, ocean analysis member fmeVerticalReduce is called.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_compute_interval
nml_option.description: Timestamp determining how often analysis member computation should be performed.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_output_stream
nml_option.description: Name of the stream that the fmeVerticalReduce analysis member should be tied to.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_compute_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member computation occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_write_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member write occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_fields
nml_option.description: Comma-separated field names for generic vertical reduction (user-configurable).
nml_option.possible_values: Comma-separated list of field names or 'none'

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_methods
nml_option.description: Comma-separated reduction methods (sum or avg) for each field in fields list.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_reference_salinity
nml_option.description: Reference salinity (PSU) for freshwater content calculation.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_horiz_remap_file
nml_option.description: Path to ESMF/TempestRemap weight file for horizontal remapping vertically reduced fields to lat-lon grid.

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_stream_output_interval
nml_option.description: Output interval for the fmeVerticalReduce stream. Format: YY-MM-DD_HH:MM:SS
nml_option.possible_values: Any valid MPAS time interval string

nml_option.name: config_AM_fmeVerticalReduce_time_averaging
nml_option.description: If true, remapped output fields are time-averaged over the output interval instead of instantaneous. Set compute_interval to a frequent value (e.g. dt) when enabling.

package.name: fmeVerticalReduceAMPKG
package.description: This package includes variables required for the fmeVerticalReduce analysis member.

var.name: oceanHeatContent
var.description: Column-integrated ocean heat content: sum of T * h * rho_sw * cp_sw

var.name: freshwaterContent
var.description: Column-integrated freshwater content: sum of (S_ref - S)/S_ref * h

var.name: vertReduceField01
var.description: Generic vertical reduction output slot 1 (user-configured via namelist)

var.name: vertReduceField02
var.description: Generic vertical reduction output slot 2 (user-configured via namelist)

var.name: vertReduceField03
var.description: Generic vertical reduction output slot 3 (user-configured via namelist)

var.name: vertReduceField04
var.description: Generic vertical reduction output slot 4 (user-configured via namelist)

var.name: vertReduceField05
var.description: Generic vertical reduction output slot 5 (user-configured via namelist)
